298278a343caf204d4ccceac9689ecf1f471ff1a.user_input_preview: Artificial intelligence (AI) is the intelligence of machines or software, as opposed to the intelligence of living being

edges.description: Artificial intelligence is a field of research in computer science that develops and studies methods and software.
Artificial intelligence enables machines to perceive their environment and use learning and intelligence to take actions.
Large language models are a type of artificial intelligence trained on enormous amounts of text data.
GPT-4 is one of the most capable large language models developed by OpenAI.
PaLM is a large language model developed by Google that demonstrates strong reasoning and multilingual capabilities.
LLaMA is an open-weights model released by Meta that has enabled widespread research and experimentation.
Claude is a large language model developed by Anthropic that emphasizes safety and helpfulness.
AI safety and alignment research focuses on ensuring that AI systems behave as intended and do not cause unintended harm.
Researchers at organizations like Anthropic, DeepMind, and OpenAI are working on AI safety and alignment.
The economic and social impacts of AI are profound, affecting job displacement and creation.

nodes.description: Artificial intelligence refers to the intelligence exhibited by machines or software, as opposed to the intelligence of living beings.
nodes.name: Artificial Intelligence

nodes.description: Computer science is the study of computers and computational systems, encompassing both theoretical and practical aspects.

edges.description: Machine learning is a core subfield of artificial intelligence.
Deep learning is a type of machine learning that uses neural networks with many layers.
Deep learning has driven breakthroughs in natural language processing and computer vision.
Deep learning has driven breakthroughs in natural language processing and computer vision.
GPT-4 is a large language model from OpenAI that demonstrates the power of transformer architectures.
LLaMA is a large language model from Meta that demonstrates the power of transformer architectures.
Large language models like GPT-4 and LLaMA are trained on massive datasets.
Large language models like GPT-4 and LLaMA are trained on massive datasets.
Reinforcement learning is another branch of machine learning that trains agents through trial and error.

nodes.description: Machine learning is a core subfield of artificial intelligence that enables computers to learn from data without being explicitly programmed.
nodes.name: Machine Learning

nodes.description: Artificial intelligence is the simulation of human intelligence processes by machines, especially computer systems.
nodes.name: Artificial Intelligence

nodes.description: Deep learning is a type of machine learning that uses neural networks with many layers.
